ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geological_data" (
  "staid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geological data record */,
  "geol_reedbush_dom" TEXT /* Type of geological formation (e.g., sedimentary) */,
  "geol_reedbush_dom_pct" REAL /* Percentage representation of the geological formation */,
  "geol_reedbush_site" TEXT /* Site where the geological data was collected */,
  "geol_hunt_dom_code" TEXT /* Code representing the hunting domain geological feature */,
  "geol_hunt_dom_pct" REAL /* Percentage representation of the hunting domain feature */,
  "geol_hunt_dom_desc" TEXT /* Description of the hunting domain geological feature */,
  "geol_hunt_site_code" TEXT /* Site code for the hunting domain feature */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geological data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geological data collection point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the geological data collection point */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the geological data was collected */,
  "age" TEXT /* Estimated age of the geological formation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the geological data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_geol_hunt_dom_code FOREIGN KEY ("geol_hunt_dom_code") REFERENCES hunting_domains ("domain_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_geol_hunt_site_code FOREIGN KEY ("geol_hunt_site_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the geological sample site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation_range" TEXT /* Range of elevations at the site */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "geological_types" (
  "type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the geological type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological type (e.g., sedimentary, igneous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geological type */,
  "mineral_composition" TEXT /* Common mineral composition of the geological type */,
  "formation_process" TEXT /* Process by which the geological type forms */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the geological type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "hunting_domains" (
  "domain_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the hunting domain feature */,
  "domain_description" TEXT /* Description of the hunting domain feature */,
  "mineral_composition" TEXT /* Common mineral composition of the hunting domain feature */,
  "formation_process" TEXT /* Process by which the hunting domain feature forms */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the hunting domain feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "staid" INTEGER /* Reference to the geological data record */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the data collection point */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the data collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_staid FOREIGN KEY ("staid") REFERENCES geological_data ("staid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "staid" INTEGER /* ID of the geological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the geological data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the geological data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_staid FOREIGN KEY ("staid") REFERENCES geological_data ("staid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
